name: ml-pca
when_to_use: 有高维数据(>3 维)想降到 2D/3D 画散点看聚集/离群,或看各主成分解释方差时用它;mathjs 只有裸 eigs()、不打包 中心化→协方差→投影→explainedVariance 全流程。要扁平聚类用 skmeans,要底层裸矩阵运算用 ml-matrix。
why_valuable: PCA 是中心化→协方差→特征分解→投影→解释方差比的一整条流水线,AI 徒手算高维协方差的特征向量必错。ml-pca 一步给出投影得分、各轴解释方差与累积方差,让把高维数据降到 2D 看结构成为可复算操作(底层依赖 ml-matrix)。

data_in.note: dataset 是 样本(行)×特征(列)的 number[][];列即维度。量纲差异大的特征应 scale:true 标准化。至少需多行样本与多列特征才有降维意义。

schema.dataset: number[][] —— 样本×特征 的二维数组(行=样本,列=特征)
schema.center?: boolean —— 是否中心化(减均值),默认 true
schema.scale?: boolean —— 是否标准化(除标准差),默认 false

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;纯 JS 数值层。predict 返回 ml-matrix Matrix,取数组须 .to2DArray()。
provides.outputs: PCA 模型:predict(dataset)→投影得分 Matrix,以及 getExplainedVariance/getCumulativeVariance/getEigenvalues/getEigenvectors/getLoadings/getStandardDeviations。

api_surface.construct: new PCA(dataset, { method?:'SVD'|'NIPALS'|'covarianceMatrix', center?=true, scale?=false }) —— 命名导出 PCA,无 default
api_surface.variance: pca.getExplainedVariance() → number[] · getCumulativeVariance() → number[] · getEigenvalues() → number[]
api_surface.vectors: pca.getEigenvectors() → Matrix · pca.getLoadings() → Matrix · getStandardDeviations() → number[]

peer.note: 本条只产投影得分与方差比:取 scores 每行前两列作 (x,y) 交给图表画 2D 降维散点,用 getExplainedVariance() 标注各轴解释力。

boot.note: dataset 为 样本×特征 的 number[][]。predict 返回 Matrix,必须 .to2DArray() 才能拿数组。center 默认 true、scale 默认 false;特征量纲差异大时应设 scale:true。底层依赖 ml-matrix。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr ml-pca@4.1.1 +esm: named export `{PCA}` only (`export{c as PCA}`), no default. pca.d.ts: constructor(dataset?:MaybeMatrix, options?:{ isCovarianceMatrix?, method?:'SVD'|'NIPALS'|'covarianceMatrix', center?=true, scale?=false, nCompNIPALS?, ignoreZeroVariance? }); predict(dataset, {nComponents?})→Matrix (boot therefore calls .to2DArray()); getExplainedVariance()/getCumulativeVariance()/getEigenvalues()/getStandardDeviations()→number[]; getEigenvectors()/getLoadings()→Matrix; invert(Matrix)→Matrix; MaybeMatrix=AbstractMatrix|number[][]. Depends on ml-matrix. grep of +esm for document.*/window.*/globalThis.*/appendChild/createElement/addEventListener/localStorage = 0 hits — pure numeric, shadow-safe.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you have high-dimensional data (>3 dimensions) and want to reduce it to 2D/3D for a scatter plot of clusters/outliers, or inspect variance explained by each principal component. mathjs only provides bare eigs(), not the complete centering -> covariance -> projection -> explainedVariance pipeline. For flat clustering use skmeans; for low-level matrix operations use ml-matrix.
en.why_valuable: PCA is a full pipeline of centering -> covariance -> eigendecomposition -> projection -> explained-variance ratio. AI hand calculations of eigenvectors for high-dimensional covariance are inevitably wrong. ml-pca directly provides projected scores, variance explained by each axis, and cumulative variance, making 2D views of high-dimensional structure reproducible (using ml-matrix underneath).

data_in.note: dataset is a number[][] of samples (rows) x features (columns); columns are dimensions. Features with very different scales should use scale:true for standardization. Dimensionality reduction is meaningful only with multiple samples and multiple features.

schema.dataset: number[][] -- 2D sample x feature array (rows=samples, columns=features)
schema.center?: boolean -- Whether to center (subtract mean); default true
schema.scale?: boolean -- Whether to standardize (divide by standard deviation); default false
